**Summarizing skill-creator search results**

content.text:
I searched the entire working tree for any “skill-creator” directories or files. There are no matches anywhere under `/Users/my/.claude/worktrees/agent-ab06c742` (including inside `.Trash/my-project 19.06.43`), nor within `.claude/skills` or `.agents/skills`. The only skill-related directory under the repository is the archived project in the trash:

- `/Users/my/.claude/worktrees/agent-ab06c742/.Trash/my-project 19.06.43/.claude/skills/` contains individual skill folders such as `commit`, `compile-latex`, `create-lecture`, `proofread`, `review-paper`, etc. Each of those holds a `SKILL.md` describing how that skill works.

Because no `skill-creator` entry exists and there are no references to “skill-creator” in the documentation files I could read, it appears that either the skill-creator directory hasn’t been added to this repository or it resides outside the current tree. If you expected a “skill-creator” directory or documentation, please let me know if there’s another path I should inspect (or a more specific name) so I can continue the search.
